attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT

NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT3,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT4,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT5,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.DB_SEGMENT6,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ENTERED_CURRENCY,
CAST(NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.EXCHANGE_RATE AS NUMBER) EXCHANGE_RATE,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.EXCHANGE_DATE,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ADJ_SOURCE,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.AUTO_EXECUTE_FLAG,

NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.GL_BATCH_ID,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.GL_POSTED_DATE,

CAST(NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.GL_IFACED_AMT AS NUMBER) GL_IFACED_AMT,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.FUNC_CURRENCY,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ADJ_STATUS,

NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ACTION_TYPE,

NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE6,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE7,

NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE9,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE10, 
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE11,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE12,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE13,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE14,
NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE15,

NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.SRC_NAME,

CAST(NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS.ACCRUAL_UNPOSTED AS NUMBER) ACCRUAL_UNPOSTED,

FROM
 NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS_MV  NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS
WHERE LAST_UPDATE_DATE > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
